text:
Fullmetal Alchemist Anime Profiles is a guidebook for the 2003 anime, giving detailed information of all the characters in the anime as well as episode summaries for all 51 episodes.

Product Description

Fullmetal Alchemist began as a popular manga series in Japan and quickly exploded into a worldwide anime hit. Now available for the first time in English, the "Fullmetal Alchemist Anime Profiles" guide will help fans keep track of their favorite episodes and cross-reference all their favorite characters.
